overview: A full-featured movie and event booking platform where users can browse events, pick seats, pay securely, and manage their tickets — with a complete admin panel for managing venues, showtimes, and bookings.
features: Browse movies, concerts, and events with filtering by date, genre, price, and location
Interactive seat map with ticket category selection (VIP, Regular, Balcony)
Stripe-powered secure checkout with booking confirmation
User dashboard with booking history, status tracking, and cancellation
Admin panel for managing venues, events, showtimes, and seat inventory
Booking analytics with revenue reports, occupancy rates, and popular events
